summary: Client view changes - All 8 features verified successfully. Personal mode LHS sidebar only shows DASHBOARD group with 'My Dashboard' and 'Markets' (no Planning, Research, Settings, Tools, Investments). Dashboard has exactly 6 tabs in correct order: Overview, Net Worth, Wealth Trends, Investments, Insights, Transactions. Investments tab embeds UnifiedInvestments with 10 sub-tabs. Net Worth tab has 'Assets by Entity' as FIRST section showing Super/Personal/Joint breakdowns. All tabs render correctly.

issues: Retirement Readiness gauge shows 0% with 'At Risk' badge - likely API not returning confidence score (mock data issue, not a bug)
Recharts warnings about chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: SIDEBAR: PASS - personalNavGroups correctly stripped to Dashboard only (My Dashboard + Markets)
TAB ORDER: PASS - Exactly 6 tabs: Overview, Net Worth, Wealth Trends, Investments, Insights, Transactions
TAB DATA-TESTIDS: PASS - All tabs have correct data-testid attributes (tab-overview, tab-net-worth, etc.)
INVESTMENTS TAB: PASS - UnifiedInvestments component embedded with 10 sub-tabs (Overview, Bonds, Cash & TDs, Crypto, Managed Funds, Property, Shares & ETFs, SMSF, Super & Pension, Unlisted)
NET WORTH TAB: PASS - 'Assets by Entity' is FIRST section (position 0), showing Super $443K, Personal $1.156M, Joint $679K with percentages
OVERVIEW TAB: PASS - Contains Retirement Readiness, Net Worth, Quick Actions, Asset Allocation sections
WEALTH TRENDS TAB: PASS - NetWorthTrend component renders with chart showing 24-month history
INSIGHTS TAB: PASS - SmartInsights component renders with AI-powered recommendations
TRANSACTIONS TAB: PASS - Entity filter dropdown and investments table present
test_credentials: No auth required. Set localStorage: disclaimer_accepted='true', app_mode='personal', remove selected_client
seed_data_creation: None - used existing mock data in PersonalDashboard.jsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Personal mode dashboard redesign complete. Key data-testid values: personal-dashboard, tab-overview, tab-net-worth, tab-wealth-trends, tab-investments, tab-insights, tab-transactions, unified-investments, asset-breakdown-table, full-calculation-table. Compliance modal may appear - dismiss with 'I Understand & Accept' button. LHS sidebar in personal mode only shows DASHBOARD group.

sidebar_navigation.details: Personal mode sidebar only shows DASHBOARD group with 'My Dashboard' (HOME badge) and 'Markets' (LIVE badge). No Planning, Research, Settings, Tools, or Investments sections present.

tab_order.details: Exactly 6 tabs in correct order: Overview, Net Worth, Wealth Trends, Investments, Insights, Transactions

investments_tab.details: UnifiedInvestments component embedded with data-testid='unified-investments'. Contains 10 sub-tabs: Overview, Bonds, Cash & TDs, Crypto, Managed Funds, Property, Shares & ETFs, SMSF, Super & Pension, Unlisted

net_worth_assets_by_entity.details: 'Assets by Entity' is FIRST section (position 0 in text content). Shows Super $443,000 (19.4%), Personal $1,156,000 (50.7%), Joint $679,000 (29.8%)

overview_tab.details: Contains Retirement Readiness gauge, Net Worth summary ($1,608,800), Quick Actions (Check Retirement, Goals & Scenarios, Rebalance Portfolio), Asset Allocation pie chart

wealth_trends_tab.details: NetWorthTrend component renders with 24-month chart, shows Current Net Worth $1,608,800, Change +$420,287 (+35.4%), Best/Worst month stats

insights_tab.details: SmartInsights component renders with AI-powered recommendations: Property Heavy Portfolio, Catch-Up Super Contributions, Superannuation Review, Consider International Exposure, Insurance Coverage Review

transactions_tab.details: Entity filter dropdown (All Entities, Personal, Super, Trust, Company) and investments table showing 12 investments totaling $2,278,000

mocked_apis_list: Mock assets/liabilities in PersonalDashboard.jsx (mockAssets, mockLiabilities arrays)
